mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation expectations, as indicated by a 2-month consecutive increase in CPIAUCSL above 210, signal central bank intervention that destabilizes equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 210 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in FEDFUNDS and rising CPIAUCSL indicate accommodative policy amid inflation, creating uncertainty that depresses equity risk premiums and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint movement of FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL fails to predict SPX returns with a Rank IC > 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production (INDPRO) below 100 signals reduced supply capacity, increasing input costs and depressing corporate margins, which leads to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO falls below 100 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the unemployment rate (UNRATE) below 7.0% signals tight labor markets that boost wage growth and corporate profitability, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 40% of instances where UNRATE falls below 7.0% despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts (HOUST) above 550 thousand units signals strong consumer demand, which drives economic growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of instances where HOUST exceeds 550 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in consumer spending (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) indicates robust demand, which drives corporate revenue growth and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint movement of RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict SPX returns with a Rank IC > 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A monetary tightening cycle, indicated by FEDFUNDS above 2.0%, raises borrowing costs and reduces corporate investment, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 2.0 despite the signal.
